ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "gsis_id" TEXT /* GSIS ID of the player */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  "salary" INTEGER /* Salary of the player */,
  "wProjection" REAL /* Projected weekly points for the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player */,
  "college" TEXT /* College the player attended */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Draft round */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Draft pick number */,
  "contract_details" TEXT /* Detailed contract information */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Current injury status of the player */,
  "fantasy_position" TEXT /* Fantasy position of the player */,
  "fantasy_points" REAL /* Total fantasy points the player has scored */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team FOREIGN KEY ("team") REFERENCES teams ("team_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* Logo of the team */,
  "team_logo_wordmark" TEXT /* Wordmark of the team */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the head coach */,
  "coach_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years the coach has been with the team */,
  "team_mascot" TEXT /* Team mascot */,
  "team_colors" TEXT /* Team colors */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the home stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the home stadium */,
  "team_foundation_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "team_website" TEXT /* Official website URL of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player playing in the game */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "game_time" TEXT /* Time of the game */,
  "opponent" TEXT /* Opponent of the player's team */,
  "game_location" TEXT /* Location of the game */,
  "implied_team_total" REAL /* Implied team total for the game */,
  "game_result" TEXT /* Result of the game (win, loss, tie) */,
  "score" TEXT /* Final score of the game */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of attendees at the game */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (regular season, playoff, etc.) */,
  "tv_network" TEXT /* TV network broadcasting the game */,
  "game_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
column_names: Projected weekly points for the player
Date of birth of the player
Current injury status of the player
Total fantasy points the player has scored
Number of years the coach has been with the team
Official website URL of the team
ID of the player playing in the game
Implied team total for the game
Result of the game (win, loss, tie)
Number of attendees at the game
Type of game (regular season, playoff, etc.)
Additional notes or comments about the game
